title: Xtra Dense Saudi Arabian Lamb Kebabs
description: Spicy and dense Saudi Arabian lamb kebabs featuring white sauerkraut, made using sous-vide for a weeknight diabetic-friendly dish
instructions: Preheat the sous-vide machine to 130 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together lamb, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Thread the lamb mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers in a sous-vide bag and seal, making sure to remove as much air as possible.
Cook the lamb in the sous-vide machine for 2 hours.
While the lamb is cooking, heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the white sauerkraut to the pan and cook, stirring occasionally, until it is lightly browned.
Remove the lamb from the sous-vide machine and add it to the pan with the sauerkraut.
Cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the lamb is coated in the sauerkraut mixture.
